title: Lesson 109: 余り, 雨, 飴...

items.gloss: remainder; remnant; rest; balance; surplus; remains (of a meal); leftovers; (not) very; (not) much; too much; excessively; overly; extreme; great; severe; tremendous; terrible; more than; over
rain; rainy day; rainy weather; the November suit (in hanafuda)
(hard) candy; toffee; rice-sugar; sugar made from the starch of rice, potatoes, etc.; amber; yellowish-brown
to wash; to cleanse; to rinse; to inquire into; to investigate; to purify (one's heart); to lave (e.g. shore); to wash over (e.g. deck); to sweep
to be; to exist; to live; to have; to be located; to be equipped with; to happen; to come about
